title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extends Navroz greetings
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extends Navroz greetings

May Navroz strengthen our unity and open doors to good health, prosperity, and joy for everyone

Posted On:
21 MAR 2026 10:58AM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extended greetings on the occasion of Navroz, conveying wishes of good health, prosperity and joy for everyone.

In a post on X, Union Home Minister Shri Amit Shah said, "Greetings on the festive occasion of Navroz. May this day strengthen our unity and open doors to good health, prosperity, and joy for everyone."

Greetings on the festive occasion of Navroz.
May this day strengthen our unity and open doors to good health, prosperity, and joy for everyone.
pic.twitter.com/dgqYhXEiWq
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
March 21, 2026

***
